title: AI Plugin Manifest
description: Plugin manifest for Claude Code (.claude-plugin/plugin.json) or Cursor (.cursor-plugin/plugin.json). Uses strict validation — no extra fields beyond those defined here.

oneOf.description: Relative path to a hooks JSON file (must start with ./ and end with .json)

hooks.description: Hooks configuration — either a path string to a .json file or an inline hooks object

oneOf.description: Relative path to a commands .md file or directory (must start with ./)

items.description: Relative path to a commands .md file or directory

oneOf.description: Array of relative paths to command files or directories
Record of command name to command object

commands.description: Commands — path string, array of paths, or record of command objects

oneOf.description: Relative path to an agent .md file (must start with ./ and end with .md)

items.description: Relative path to an agent .md file

oneOf.description: Array of relative paths to agent .md files

agents.description: Agent definitions — path string or array of paths to .md files

oneOf.description: Relative path to a skill directory (must start with ./)

items.description: Relative path to a skill directory

oneOf.description: Array of relative paths to skill directories

skills.description: Skill definitions — directory path or array of directory paths (not SKILL.md file paths)
